projects.title: Flero
projects.description: Agent-first enterprise workflow automation platform. Lead designer working with Dan and the AICE Technology team. Canvas-based editor where humans and AI agents collaborate on long-running workflows with full audit trails.

projects.title: PhD in Human Computer Interaction
projects.description: Research on how people understand and trust AI agents that act on their behalf. Studying observability and explainability for non-technical users.

projects.title: TanjaOS
projects.description: Personal Windows XP time capsule at tanjaos.space. A nostalgic OS-style website built with Next.js and a lot of love. The opposite of a portfolio.

projects.title: Replace this with your real work
projects.description: Edit public/data/projects.json to swap these placeholders for your real projects. Add a thumbnail under public/images/projects/, set the link, and you are done.
